supported_devices: Mars Hydro LED grow lights (FC, FC-E, TS, SP3000, SP3000R, ADlite100), iFresh inline fans, clip fans, Mars Hydro humidifiers; non-RJ12 AC devices (humidifiers, dehumidifiers, heaters) via iHub-4AC 2.0 expansion
compatible_ec_fans: Mars Hydro iFresh inline and clip fans
compatible_lights: Mars Hydro FC, FC-E, TS (except TS600), SP3000, SP3000R, ADlite100 series (2024+ models with RJ12 port)
compatible_sensors: Mars Hydro temp/humidity sensor (included), PPFD sensor, CO2 sensor, soil moisture sensor (optional, sold separately)
compatible_humidifiers: Mars Hydro 6L humidifier; non-smart humidifiers via iHub-4AC 2.0 expansion (on/off only)
supported_manufacturer_series: FC, FC-E, TS, SP3000, SP3000R, ADlite100, iFresh
recommended_use_note: RJ12-only control hub; no built-in AC outlets; controls Mars Hydro lights and fans natively via RJ12; requires iHub-4AC 2.0 to control non-RJ12 AC devices (humidifiers, heaters, dehumidifiers); expandable with iHub Pro or iHub-4AC 2.0
uvp_notes: Base unit €49.99; bundle configurations up to €136.99 with sensor add-ons
notes: No built-in AC outlets — control of non-RJ12 AC devices (humidifiers, dehumidifiers, heaters) requires iHub-4AC 2.0 expansion (sold separately). Controls up to 2 light groups, 1 clip fan group, 1 inline fan natively via RJ12. Stage-based automation (seedling, veg, flower). Supports daisy-chaining up to 40 lights. MarsPro app. DC 12V powered (PSU included).
